 from __future__ import annotations

+from agent.analytics.models.plaid import PlaidDataDocument, PlaidTransactionsResponse
 from agent.analytics.services.plaid_analytics import compute_plaid_analytics
 from agent.plaid.models import PlaidAccount, PlaidItem, PlaidTransaction
 from agent.plaid.schemas import (
@@ -15,6 +16,9 @@ from agent.plaid.schemas import (
 )
 
 
+logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

+
 class BankReportNotFoundError(Exception):
     """Raised when a bank report cannot be generated due to missing data."""
 
@@ -26,7 +30,12 @@ async def build_bank_report_view(
     user_last_name: str | None = None,
     business_name: str | None = None,
 ) -> BankReportViewResponse:
-    """Build a complete bank report payload from normalized Plaid collections."""
+    """Build a complete bank report payload from normalized Plaid data.
+
+    Uses ``PlaidTransaction`` rows when present (production Plaid sync path).
+    Falls back to ``PlaidDataDocument.raw_json`` only when normalized
+    transactions are missing but seeded raw data exists (trial/UAT users).
+    """
 
     accounts = await PlaidAccount.find(
         PlaidAccount.user_id == user_id,
@@ -50,6 +59,15 @@ async def build_bank_report_view(
     ).sort(-PlaidTransaction.id).to_list()
 
     if not transactions:
+        fallback_report = await _build_bank_report_view_from_plaid_data_document(
+            user_id=user_id,
+            primary_account_id=primary_account.account_id,
+            user_first_name=user_first_name,
+            user_last_name=user_last_name,
+            business_name=business_name,
+        )
+        if fallback_report is not None:
+            return fallback_report
         raise BankReportNotFoundError(
             "No bank transactions found for the selected primary account."
         )
@@ -271,6 +289,75 @@ def build_bank_report_view_from_preview_payload(
     )
 
 
+async def _build_bank_report_view_from_plaid_data_document(
+    *,
+    user_id: str,
+    primary_account_id: str,
+    user_first_name: str | None,
+    user_last_name: str | None,
+    business_name: str | None,
+) -> BankReportViewResponse | None:
+    """
+    Build a bank report from seeded raw Plaid JSON when normalized transactions
+    are missing.
+
+    Trial/UAT signups store transactions in ``PlaidDataDocument`` but not always
+    in ``PlaidTransaction``. Production users with a completed Plaid sync have
+    normalized rows and never reach this path.
+    """
+    doc = await PlaidDataDocument.find_one(PlaidDataDocument.smb_id == user_id)
+    if doc is None or not doc.raw_json:
+        return None
+
+    raw_json = doc.raw_json
+    raw_accounts = raw_json.get("accounts")
+    raw_transactions = raw_json.get("transactions")
+    if not isinstance(raw_accounts, list) or not raw_accounts:
+        return None
+    if not isinstance(raw_transactions, list) or not raw_transactions:
+        return None
+
+    account_transactions = [
+        txn
+        for txn in raw_transactions
+        if isinstance(txn, dict) and txn.get("account_id") == primary_account_id
+    ]
+    if not account_transactions:
+        return None
+
+    raw_item = raw_json.get("item")
+    institution_name = (
+        raw_item.get("institution_name")
+        if isinstance(raw_item, dict)
+        else None
+    )
+
+    logger.info(
+        "Building bank report from PlaidDataDocument fallback | user_id=%s account_id=%s txn_count=%s",
+        user_id,
+        primary_account_id,
+        len(account_transactions),
+    )
+
+    return build_bank_report_view_from_preview_payload(
+        payload=BankReportPreviewDownloadRequest(
+            accounts=raw_accounts,
+            transactions=raw_transactions,
+            total_transactions=raw_json.get("total_transactions") or len(raw_transactions),
+            request_id=raw_json.get("request_id") or "",
+            item=raw_item if isinstance(raw_item, dict) else None,
+            selected_account_id=primary_account_id,
+            institution_name=institution_name,
+            user_name=_build_user_name(user_first_name, user_last_name),
+            business_name=business_name,
+        ),
+        user_id=user_id,
+        user_first_name=user_first_name,
+        user_last_name=user_last_name,
+        business_name=business_name,
+    )
+
+
 def _resolve_primary_account(accounts: list[PlaidAccount]) -> PlaidAccount:
     selected = [account for account in accounts if account.selected]
     if selected:
test_patch:
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_plaid_report_service.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_plaid_report_service.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..48a25c8
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_plaid_report_service.py
@@ -0,0 +1,356 @@
+"""Tests for the bank report service raw-data fallback.
+
+``build_bank_report_view`` normally builds a report from normalized
+``PlaidTransaction`` rows. Trial / UAT users only have their bank data seeded
+into ``PlaidDataDocument.raw_json`` and never get normalized rows, so the
+report must fall back to that raw JSON (filtered to the primary account)
+instead of raising ``BankReportNotFoundError``.
+"""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import contextlib
+import unittest
+from datetime import datetime, timezone
+from types import SimpleNamespace
+from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, MagicMock, patch
+
+from agent.plaid.report_service import (
+    BankReportNotFoundError,
+    build_bank_report_view,
+)
+
+_UNSET = object()
+
+
+def _account(account_id: str, *, selected: bool = True, updated_at: datetime | None = None):
+    """A normalized ``PlaidAccount`` row as a typed fake.
+
+    Every attribute the report path (or any reasonable alternative
+    implementation of it) might read is present with a real value or an
+    explicit ``None`` — including ``institution_name`` — so that no bare
+    ``MagicMock`` attribute can leak into a pydantic model. In particular the
+    seeded (trial/UAT) account carries no institution of its own; the report's
+    institution name comes from the raw Plaid ``item`` block, and where that
+    block is absent the result must be ``None``, never a ``MagicMock``.
+    """
+    when = updated_at or datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
+    return SimpleNamespace(
+        user_id="user-1",
+        item_id="item-1",
+        account_id=account_id,
+        name=f"Account {account_id}",
+        official_name=f"Account {account_id} (Checking)",
+        mask="0000",
+        type="depository",
+        subtype="checking",
+        iso_currency_code="USD",
+        available_balance=1000.0,
+        current_balance=1200.0,
+        limit_balance=None,
+        institution_name=None,
+        selected=selected,
+        active=True,
+        last_synced_at=None,
+        created_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc),
+        updated_at=when,
+    )
+
+
+def _raw_account(account_id: str, *, name: str = "Business Checking"):
+    return {
+        "account_id": account_id,
+        "balances": {
+            "available": 1000.0,
+            "current": 1200.0,
+            "iso_currency_code": "USD",
+            "limit": None,
+            "unofficial_currency_code": None,
+        },
+        "mask": "0000",
+        "name": name,
+        "official_name": f"{name} Account",
+        "subtype": "checking",
+        "type": "depository",
+    }
+
+
+def _raw_txn(account_id: str, transaction_id: str, *, amount: float, date: str, primary: str):
+    return {
+        "account_id": account_id,
+        "amount": amount,
+        "date": date,
+        "name": f"Txn {transaction_id}",
+        "transaction_id": transaction_id,
+        "iso_currency_code": "USD",
+        "payment_channel": "online",
+        "pending": False,
+        "personal_finance_category": {
+            "primary": primary,
+            "detailed": f"{primary}_OTHER",
+            "confidence_level": "HIGH",
+        },
+    }
+
+
+def _data_document(raw_json):
+    """A ``PlaidDataDocument`` fake carrying only explicit attributes.
+
+    Uses ``SimpleNamespace`` rather than ``MagicMock`` so that reading any
+    document attribute yields a real value (or a genuine ``AttributeError``)
+    instead of a fresh ``MagicMock`` that could flow into report assembly.
+    """
+    return SimpleNamespace(
+        id="plaid-data-doc-1",
+        smb_id="user-1",
+        provider="plaid",
+        fetched_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc),
+        raw_json=raw_json,
+    )
+
+
+@contextlib.contextmanager
+def _patched_report_service(*, accounts, transactions, data_doc, item=None, preview_return=_UNSET):
+    """Patch the DB seams of build_bank_report_view.
+
+    All four collaborators are stubbed so the report path never touches a real
+    database. ``PlaidDataDocument.find_one`` is patched on the source class so
+    the patch also resolves at the broken base revision (where report_service
+    does not import PlaidDataDocument yet).
+    """
+    fake_account = MagicMock()
+    fake_account.find.return_value.to_list = AsyncMock(return_value=accounts)
+
+    fake_item = MagicMock()
+    fake_item.find_one = AsyncMock(return_value=item)
+
+    fake_txn = MagicMock()
+    fake_txn.find.return_value.sort.return_value.to_list = AsyncMock(return_value=transactions)
+
+    with contextlib.ExitStack() as stack:
+        stack.enter_context(patch("agent.plaid.report_service.PlaidAccount", fake_account))
+        stack.enter_context(patch("agent.plaid.report_service.PlaidItem", fake_item))
+        stack.enter_context(patch("agent.plaid.report_service.PlaidTransaction", fake_txn))
+        stack.enter_context(
+            patch(
+                "agent.analytics.models.plaid.PlaidDataDocument.find_one",
+                new=AsyncMock(return_value=data_doc),
+            )
+        )
+        # Beanie is not initialized in unit tests, so the ``smb_id`` query
+        # field is not a usable class attribute; stub it so building the
+        # ``smb_id == user_id`` expression does not raise.
+        stack.enter_context(
+            patch(
+                "agent.analytics.models.plaid.PlaidDataDocument.smb_id",
+                MagicMock(),
+                create=True,
+            )
+        )
+        if preview_return is not _UNSET:
+            builder = MagicMock(return_value=preview_return)
+            stack.enter_context(
+                patch(
+                    "agent.plaid.report_service.build_bank_report_view_from_preview_payload",
+                    new=builder,
+                )
+            )
+            yield builder
+        else:
+            yield None
+
+
+class BankReportFallbackTests(unittest.IsolatedAsyncioTestCase):
+    """The fallback that rebuilds a report from PlaidDataDocument raw JSON."""
+
+    async def test_falls_back_to_data_document_when_no_normalized_transactions(self) -> None:
+        raw_json = {
+            "accounts": [_raw_account("acct-primary"), _raw_account("acct-other", name="Savings")],
+            "transactions": [
+                _raw_txn("acct-primary", "t1", amount=12.5, date="2026-05-01", primary="FOOD_AND_DRINK"),
+                _raw_txn("acct-primary", "t2", amount=-2000.0, date="2026-05-03", primary="INCOME"),
+                _raw_txn("acct-other", "t3", amount=5.0, date="2026-05-02", primary="GENERAL_SERVICES"),
+            ],
+            "total_transactions": 3,
+            "request_id": "req-xyz",
+            "item": {
+                "institution_id": "ins_1",
+                "institution_name": "Test Bank",
+                "item_id": "item-1",
+                "available_products": [],
+                "billed_products": [],
+            },
+        }
+        with _patched_report_service(
+            accounts=[_account("acct-primary")],
+            transactions=[],
+            data_doc=_data_document(raw_json),
+        ):
+            resp = await build_bank_report_view(user_id="user-1")
+
+        # A report was produced instead of BankReportNotFoundError being raised.
+        self.assertEqual(resp.primary_account.account_id, "acct-primary")
+        self.assertEqual(resp.report.institution_name, "Test Bank")
+        self.assertEqual(resp.report.total_transactions, 2)
+
+    async def test_fallback_filters_transactions_to_primary_account(self) -> None:
+        raw_json = {
+            "accounts": [_raw_account("acct-primary"), _raw_account("acct-other", name="Savings")],
+            "transactions": [
+                _raw_txn("acct-primary", "t1", amount=12.5, date="2026-05-01", primary="FOOD_AND_DRINK"),
+                _raw_txn("acct-primary", "t2", amount=-2000.0, date="2026-05-03", primary="INCOME"),
+                _raw_txn("acct-other", "t3", amount=5.0, date="2026-05-02", primary="GENERAL_SERVICES"),
+            ],
+            "total_transactions": 3,
+            "request_id": "req-1",
+            "item": {"institution_name": "Test Bank", "item_id": "item-1"},
+        }
+        with _patched_report_service(
+            accounts=[_account("acct-primary")],
+            transactions=[],
+            data_doc=_data_document(raw_json),
+        ):
+            resp = await build_bank_report_view(user_id="user-1")
+
+        # Only the primary account's two transactions survive; the third is dropped.
+        self.assertEqual(len(resp.transactions), 2)
+        self.assertEqual(resp.report.total_transactions, 2)
+        self.assertTrue(all(txn.account_id == "acct-primary" for txn in resp.transactions))
+
+    async def test_fallback_selects_transactions_of_selected_primary_account(self) -> None:
+        # Account "acct-b" is the selected one, so it must drive which raw
+        # transactions are included even though "acct-a" appears first.
+        raw_json = {
+            "accounts": [_raw_account("acct-a", name="Checking A"), _raw_account("acct-b", name="Checking B")],
+            "transactions": [
+                _raw_txn("acct-a", "a1", amount=10.0, date="2026-04-01", primary="GENERAL_SERVICES"),
+                _raw_txn("acct-b", "b1", amount=20.0, date="2026-04-02", primary="FOOD_AND_DRINK"),
+                _raw_txn("acct-b", "b2", amount=-500.0, date="2026-04-03", primary="INCOME"),
+            ],
+            "total_transactions": 3,
+            "request_id": "req-2",
+            "item": {"institution_name": "Test Bank", "item_id": "item-1"},
+        }
+        accounts = [
+            _account("acct-a", selected=False, updated_at=datetime(2026, 5, 2, tzinfo=timezone.utc)),
+            _account("acct-b", selected=True, updated_at=datetime(2026, 5, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc)),
+        ]
+        with _patched_report_service(accounts=accounts, transactions=[], data_doc=_data_document(raw_json)):
+            resp = await build_bank_report_view(user_id="user-1")
+
+        self.assertEqual(resp.primary_account.account_id, "acct-b")
+        self.assertEqual(len(resp.transactions), 2)
+        self.assertTrue(all(txn.account_id == "acct-b" for txn in resp.transactions))
+
+    async def test_fallback_builds_report_when_raw_item_missing(self) -> None:
+        # No "item" block in the seeded JSON: the report must still build.
+        raw_json = {
+            "accounts": [_raw_account("acct-primary")],
+            "transactions": [
+                _raw_txn("acct-primary", "t1", amount=12.5, date="2026-05-01", primary="FOOD_AND_DRINK"),
+            ],
+            "total_transactions": 1,
+            "request_id": "req-3",
+        }
+        with _patched_report_service(
+            accounts=[_account("acct-primary")],
+            transactions=[],
+            data_doc=_data_document(raw_json),
+        ):
+            resp = await build_bank_report_view(user_id="user-1")
+
+        self.assertEqual(resp.report.total_transactions, 1)
+        self.assertIn(resp.report.institution_name, (None, ""))
+
+    async def test_fallback_passes_selected_account_id_to_preview_builder(self) -> None:
+        raw_json = {
+            "accounts": [_raw_account("acct-primary")],
+            "transactions": [
+                _raw_txn("acct-primary", "t1", amount=12.5, date="2026-05-01", primary="FOOD_AND_DRINK"),
+            ],
+            "total_transactions": 1,
+            "request_id": "req-4",
+            "item": {"institution_name": "Test Bank", "item_id": "item-1"},
+        }
+        sentinel = MagicMock(name="report_view")
+        with _patched_report_service(
+            accounts=[_account("acct-primary")],
+            transactions=[],
+            data_doc=_data_document(raw_json),
+            preview_return=sentinel,
+        ) as builder:
+            resp = await build_bank_report_view(user_id="user-1")
+
+        self.assertIs(resp, sentinel)
+        builder.assert_called_once()
+        kwargs = builder.call_args.kwargs
+        self.assertEqual(kwargs["payload"].selected_account_id, "acct-primary")
+        self.assertEqual(kwargs["user_id"], "user-1")
+        self.assertEqual(len(kwargs["payload"].transactions), 1)
+
+    async def test_fallback_forwards_business_and_user_name(self) -> None:
+        raw_json = {
+            "accounts": [_raw_account("acct-primary")],
+            "transactions": [
+                _raw_txn("acct-primary", "t1", amount=12.5, date="2026-05-01", primary="FOOD_AND_DRINK"),
+            ],
+            "total_transactions": 1,
+            "request_id": "req-5",
+            "item": {"institution_name": "Test Bank", "item_id": "item-1"},
+        }
+        with _patched_report_service(
+            accounts=[_account("acct-primary")],
+            transactions=[],
+            data_doc=_data_document(raw_json),
+        ):
+            resp = await build_bank_report_view(
+                user_id="user-1",
+                user_first_name="Ada",
+                user_last_name="Lovelace",
+                business_name="Analytical Engines LLC",
+            )
+
+        self.assertEqual(resp.report.user_name, "Ada Lovelace")
+        self.assertEqual(resp.report.business_name, "Analytical Engines LLC")
+
+
+class BankReportNoDataTests(unittest.IsolatedAsyncioTestCase):
+    """Cases where there is genuinely no usable data: must still raise."""
+
+    async def test_raises_when_no_connected_accounts(self) -> None:
+        with _patched_report_service(accounts=[], transactions=[], data_doc=None):
+            with self.assertRaises(BankReportNotFoundError):
+                await build_bank_report_view(user_id="user-1")
+
+    async def test_raises_when_no_transactions_and_no_data_document(self) -> None:
+        with _patched_report_service(
+            accounts=[_account("acct-primary")],
+            transactions=[],
+            data_doc=None,
+        ):
+            with self.assertRaises(BankReportNotFoundError):
+                await build_bank_report_view(user_id="user-1")
+
+    async def test_raises_when_data_document_has_no_matching_account(self) -> None:
+        # Seeded JSON exists but none of its transactions belong to the primary
+        # account, so there is nothing to report.
+        raw_json = {
+            "accounts": [_raw_account("acct-other")],
+            "transactions": [
+                _raw_txn("acct-other", "t9", amount=5.0, date="2026-05-02", primary="GENERAL_SERVICES"),
+            ],
+            "total_transactions": 1,
+            "request_id": "req-6",
+            "item": {"institution_name": "Test Bank", "item_id": "item-1"},
+        }
+        with _patched_report_service(
+            accounts=[_account("acct-primary")],
+            transactions=[],
+            data_doc=_data_document(raw_json),
+        ):
+            with self.assertRaises(BankReportNotFoundError):
+                await build_bank_report_view(user_id="user-1")
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
